# Resource (hush_gcp_sa_access_privilege)

Manage GCP SA access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a GCP SA access privilege with an existing service account
resource "hush_gcp_sa_access_privilege" "existing_sa" {
  name        = "gcp-storage-access"
  description = "GCP storage access privilege"
  project_id  = "my-gcp-project"
  sa_email    = "my-sa@my-gcp-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
}

# Create a GCP SA access privilege with a new service account
resource "hush_gcp_sa_access_privilege" "new_sa" {
  name        = "gcp-storage-access-new-sa"
  description = "GCP storage access privilege with new SA"
  project_id  = "my-gcp-project"

  sa_config {
    display_name = "My New Service Account"
    roles        = ["roles/storage.objectViewer"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the GCP SA access privilege
- `project_id` (String) The GCP project ID

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the GCP SA access privilege
- `sa_email` (String) The service account email. Mutually exclusive with sa_config.
- `sa_config` (Block List, Max: 1) The service account configuration. Mutually exclusive with sa_email. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--sa_config))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the GCP SA access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedblock--sa_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sa_config`

Required:

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the service account
- `roles` (List of String) The list of GCP IAM roles
